source_pr.title: privilege/privileges: fix a data race in test code
source_pr.body:
I fix a typo s/SetUpSuit/SetUpSuite in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/3675
After that, make race fail because ddl and privilege/privileges unit test run concurrently, one of them is setting log level and the other is using it.

symptoms: privilege/privileges: fix a data race in test code

fix_pattern: privilege/privileges: fix a data race in test code

evidence: evidence: privilege/privileges: fix a data race in test code
